info.description: Runtime controls for the AI Cake Maker (Sprint 2). enabled=false until Sprint 2 ships.

enabled.description: Master switch. False = AI page shows a "coming soon" state.

dailyGenerationLimit.description: Max AI generations per phone number per day

imagesPerRequest.description: Concepts generated per request (max 4 per OpenAI Images API)

costPerRequest.description: Estimated INR cost per generation — informational only, not enforced

bannedKeywords.description: Array of strings blocked from prompts: ["Disney", "Marvel", ...]

promptPrefix.description: Injected before every user prompt (safety/style instructions)

promptSuffix.description: Injected after every user prompt (quality/format instructions)

monthlyBudget.description: Monthly OpenAI spend limit in INR — informational; enforcement is manual
